Enum Class CardValue

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<CardValue>
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card.CardValue
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<CardValue>, Constable
public enum CardValue extends Enum<CardValue>
An enumeration of Uno card values
Version:
1.0 2025-11-10 Initial implementation based on standard_cards.card.Rank
Author:
David M Rosenberg

  • Constructor Details

    • CardValue

      private CardValue(String theDisplayName, String theAbbreviation, String theGraphic, int thePoints, int theSortOrder, int theQuantity, CardValue.Kind theKind, CardColor[] theColors)
      Sets all fields representing an Uno card's face value
      Parameters:
      theDisplayName - more esthetically pleasing for display
      theAbbreviation - abbreviation for the face value
      theGraphic - a graphic representation/icon
      thePoints - point value for the card for scoring
      theSortOrder - numeric sortOrder for the card
      theQuantity - the number of this value for each color
      theKind - number or action
      theColors - colors applicable for this value

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static CardValue[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static CardValue valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
